channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI stocks in an 'air pocket'; Meta and Microsoft traded like 'bear market names that cannot be owned,' analyst says
item.description: Everything you need to know before you reach the office this morning.

item.title: Boston Dynamics CEO: America's next 250 years will be built by robots. Here's what stands in the way
item.description: The U.S. has led major industrial leaps; robotics is next, but only if Washington, industry, and workers collaborate.

item.title: America's AI hunger reaches Nashville Zoo, endangering its animals
item.description: Country star Brad Paisley helped gather over 500,000 signatures on a petition opposing the development.

item.title: GCC debt markets rally after ceasefire, but tight liquidity remains a challenge
item.description: Geopolitical easing has boosted GCC bond and sukuk issuance. However, expected steady Fed rates and tight liquidity pose hurdles.
